title: tekagami v1
description: One JSONL line per HTTP request. Records observed facts only — no business-logic interpretation.

timeline.description: All data operations in causal order. Single seq counter across all event types. External HTTP calls are recorded as event_custom with label 'http_call'.

effects.description: Materialized summary of write operations derived from timeline[type=sql]. Disabled by Config captureEffects=false.

errors.description: Capture failures within tekagami, or application-level errors observed during the request.

flow.description: Optional correlation information supplied by the integration layer. It is mainly for explicit developer/QA investigation flows and does not by itself prove a business scenario.

flow_id.description: Optional correlation identifier. null when no flow is supplied.

seq.description: Optional explicit step index within the flow (1-based). null when not set.

redaction_meta.description: Records which redaction mode was active when this observation was written.

tokenized.description: true when redaction.secret is configured and *_tokens fields are populated.

http_envelope.description: HTTP request and response data for this observation.

path_pattern.description: Matched endpoint pattern, e.g. /products/{id}. null when not determinable.

path_tokens.description: Path with dynamic segments replaced by HMAC tokens, e.g. /products/{p-a1b2}. null when path_pattern is null or no secret.

response_kind.description: json = JSON body captured in response_shape. html = views[] captured, body not recorded. other/null = neither.

request_headers_shape.description: Key names and scalar types of request headers allowed by Config keepHeaderKeys. Values never appear here. Omitted when keepHeaderKeys is empty or no header matches.

request_headers_tokens.description: HMAC tokens for request header values allowed by Config keepHeaderKeys. Omitted when no secret, keepHeaderKeys is empty, or no header matches.

query_shape.description: Structure/types of URL query string parameters.

query_tokens.description: HMAC tokens for query parameter values. null when no secret.

query_values.description: Actual values of keys in Config keepKeys (whitelist). Survives AI export.

request_shape.description: Structure/types of request body (JSON or form-encoded).

request_tokens.description: HMAC tokens for request body values. null when no secret.

request_values.description: Actual values of keys in Config keepKeys (whitelist). Survives AI export.

response_shape.description: Structure/types of JSON response body. null for HTML or non-JSON responses.

views.description: HTML view templates rendered, in render order. Populated when response_kind='html'.

template.description: Template file path relative to views root.

vars_shape.description: Shape of the variables passed to this view.

event_sql.description: A SQL statement executed during this request.

seq.description: Global causal position across all timeline events (1-based).

operation.description: SELECT / INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE / MERGE / REPLACE / UPSERT / UNKNOWN

statement_normalized.description: SQL with all literals replaced by {parameter}. Stable grouping key across runs.

statement_tokens.description: SQL with literals replaced by HMAC tokens — same value → same token. null when no secret.

statement_text.description: Full raw SQL string. null by default; only present when Config captureText=true.

statement_hash.description: sha256:<hex> of statement_normalized. Stable across runs; links to effects[].statement_hash.

statement_fingerprint.description: Layer-B semantic fingerprint derived from operation, tables, filter columns, and write columns.

bind_tokens.description: HMAC tokens for bind values. null when no secret.

observed_values.description: Values extracted best-effort from the compiled SQL for columns matching Config sqlValueAllowlist. Key format: 'table.column' or 'column'. Complex SQL, function calls, comma-containing literals, or dialect-specific literals may not be extracted.

statement_fingerprint.description: Layer-B SQL semantic fingerprint. Unlike statement_hash, it is intended to survive SQL text changes across framework migrations.

op.description: Operation extracted from the SQL, e.g. SELECT / INSERT / UPDATE.

tables.description: Uppercase table names used for the fingerprint view.

filter_columns.description: Columns used in WHERE / ON / HAVING comparisons.

write_columns.description: Columns written by INSERT / UPDATE SET.

fp_hash.description: fp1:<hex> hash of the canonical Layer-B fingerprint payload.

observed_column.description: Distinct values observed for one table.column key within a SQL statement.

redacted.description: false = actual value kept (column is in sqlValueAllowlist). true = HMAC token (reserved; not yet emitted).

values.description: Distinct actual or tokenized values seen for this column in this statement.

sql_analysis.description: Confidence metadata for the SQL regex analysis. Low confidence is expected for complex queries; use warnings to understand gaps.

dialect.description: SQL dialect used for analysis, e.g. 'oracle', 'sqlite'. Custom analyzers may report other identifiers.

warnings.description: Known limitations for this statement, e.g. 'query_history_capture_has_no_bind_values', 'tables_not_detected'.

event_custom.description: A manually instrumented operation inserted by the application or adapter.

seq.description: Global causal position across all timeline events (1-based).

effect.description: One entry in the write-operation summary. Derived from timeline[type=sql] write ops.

op.description: INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE / MERGE / REPLACE / UPSERT

table.description: Uppercase table name. null when table detection failed.

count.description: How many times this (op, table, hash) combination was observed in this request.

error_item.description: A capture failure within tekagami, or an application-level error observed during the request.

at.description: Rough source location, e.g. class name or PHP file:line.
